description: Government People Group (GPG) is the strategic and functional centre for the Government People Function and human resources (HR) in the Civil Service. GPG is part of the Cabinet Office and the Civil Service .

details.body:
Government People Group (GPG) is the strategic and functional centre for the Government People Function and human resources (HR) in the Civil Service.

GPG is part of the Cabinet Office and the Civil Service.

Working in the Government People Group, the Deputy Director of Civil Service Employee Experience and People Performance is accountable for setting the direction on a range of key people issues through the Civil Service Inclusive Practice and Civil Service Organisational Development Practice. Enhanced employee experience is key to better equip the Civil Service to deliver its priorities and support reform; through increased innovation, creativity, utilisation and productivity driven by improved people performance.

Government People Group

role.title: Director of Employee Experience and People Performance

role_appointments.title: Caitlin Kinsella - Director of Employee Experience and People Performance

details.body:
The Government Chief People Officer is the head of the Government People Function and Director General of the Government People Group.

The responsibility of the GCPO includes:

  1. Overseeing the delivery of cross-government HR strategy and workforce planning.
  2. Leading the Government People Function and HR Profession in government.
  3. Ensuring the right policies and structures are in place to create an efficient and effective Civil Service.
  4. Improving the way we attract and develop talented civil servants who can deliver the Government’s agenda.

role.title: Interim Joint Director General and Government Chief People Officer

role_appointments.title: Caitlin Kinsella - Interim Joint Director General and Government Chief People Officer

role_appointments.title: Janette Durbin - Joint Interim Government Chief People Officer

details.body: Civil Service Senior Talent and Resourcing is responsible for developing individuals who have the talent and aspiration for the most senior roles in the Civil Service. This includes supporting the Cabinet Secretary in managing the appointment and development of Permanent Secretaries.

role.title: Executive Director for Senior Talent and Resourcing

role_appointments.title: Janette Durbin - Executive Director for Senior Talent and Resourcing (Jobshare)

details.body: The Director, People and Change (Human Resources Director) is responsible for the people strategy for the Department for Education and the provision of human resources services to the department and its executive agencies.

Working in the Government People Group, the Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions is accountable for setting the direction on a range of pay and reward issues including pensions. And leading on the central employment framework and policies for the Civil Service.

role.title: Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions

role_appointments.title: Simon Claydon - Director of Civil Service Pay, Policy and Pensions

details.body: The Director of People, Capability and Change leads DLUHC’s change programme, workforce strategy, pay and reward, leadership and talent management, diversity and inclusion, HR operations, recruitment, HR policy and people engagement.

role.title: Director of People, Capability and Change

role_appointments.title: Simon Claydon - Director of People, Capability and Change

details.body: The Director of People, Capability and Change leads MHCLG’s change programme, workforce strategy, pay and reward, leadership and talent management, diversity and inclusion, HR operations, recruitment, HR policy and people engagement.

role.title: Director of People, Capability and Change

role_appointments.title: Simon Claydon - Director of People, Capability and Change

details.body: The Director of Functional Strategy, Performance and Capability leads the transformation of HR across the Civil Service, and is accountable for bringing consistency and professionalisation, and the function’s valuable contribution to the modernisation and reform agenda, driving progress on automation.

role.title: Director of Functional Strategy, Performance and Capability

role_appointments.title: Henry Watson - Director of Functional Strategy, Performance and Capability

details.body:
The Director of Shared Services for Government leads the implementation of the Shared Services Strategy for Government, which was launched in May 2021. The Director works closely with clusters, government functions and suppliers to deliver the Strategy. The directorate acts as the policy lead for Shared Services and clusters in government, harnessing modern technology to deliver value for the taxpayer and improved experience for users.

Under the Shared Services Strategy, 18 departments have been brought together to replace around 200 departmental-based legacy IT systems with five modern, user-friendly, cloud-based systems. 

Read more about Shared Services for Government.

Government People Group

role.title: Director of Shared Services for Government

role_appointments.title: Nathan Moores - Director of Shared Services for Government

role_appointments.title: Zoe Sweet - Director of Employee Experience and People Performance
Andrew Key - Director of Government Skills

details.body: The Deputy Head of Mission is a senior diplomat and typically a key advisor to the Ambassador or High Commissioner. The Deputy is responsible for the daily management of an overseas Embassy or High Commission. They will represent the UK’s interests in the absence of the Ambassador as Chargé d’Affaires. A senior ranking Deputy may also take the title Minister. Smaller missions may not have a Deputy Head.

role.title: Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy Beijing

role_appointments.title: Andrew Key - Deputy Head of Mission, British Embassy Beijing

details.body: The Line Management Capability Programme focuses on raising the profile and esteem of line management by developing and setting the standards and requirements for line managers across the Civil Service. This transformational programme will improve employee experience for employees and managers and will inform the evolution of line manager training and development.  It will ensure the new standards are embedded across the Civil Service and integrated within the employee lifecycle.

role.title: Executive Director of Line Management Capability

role_appointments.title: Carol Bernard CBE - Executive Director of Line Management Capability

details.body:
The Director of People and Places is responsible for Cabinet Office Human Resources and Estates. Responsibilities include:

  • managing the strategic estate requirements of the Cabinet Office, overseeing delivery partners in the Government Property Agency (GPA)
  • leading the design and implementation of the department’s locations strategy - a transformational people change programme to increase the presence of the department across regional and devolved locations
  • leading transformational reforms in the Department, such as the transition to smarter, hybrid ways of working

role_appointments.title: Carol Bernard CBE - Director of People and Places

details.body: Carol Bernard joined the Government Property Agency in June 2022 as Non-Executive Director where she brings a wealth of change management and stakeholder engagement experience to the GPA Board.

The Government Chief People Officer is the head of the Government People Function and Director General of the Government People Group.

The responsibility of the GCPO includes:

  1. Overseeing the delivery of cross-government HR strategy and workforce planning.
  2. Leading the Government People Function and HR Profession in government.
  3. Ensuring the right policies and structures are in place to create an efficient and effective Civil Service.
  4. Improving the way we attract and develop talented civil servants who can deliver the Government’s agenda.

Responsible for providing strategic leadership and management of training across the Civil Service and delivery of the early centralised talent programmes, including the award winning Civil Service Fast Stream.
